info.title: SDKWork Notary App API
info.description: User-facing notary API. Commerce owns orders and SKU-backed matters, Drive owns files and folders, and Appbase owns organization members.

post.summary: Create a notary case, Commerce order item, and Drive notary folder
Create a party for a case

delete.summary: Remove a party from a case

post.summary: Attach a Drive-backed signature node to a party
Create a video verification invite for a notary party
Create a mobile signature invite for a notary party

get.summary: List Drive-backed files in a notary case folder

post.summary: Attach a Drive node to a notary case through Drive node properties
Create a Drive-backed download package for case files

get.summary: List IAM organization members enabled for notary business

post.summary: Assign an IAM organization member to a notary case

get.description: Returns pending review queue count, today completed count, anomaly intercepted count, and monthly preservation total for the current organization
Generate and download monthly business report for notary operations

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month in YYYY-MM format, defaults to current month

AuthToken.description: SDKWork auth token carried as Authorization: Bearer <auth_token>.

primaryNotaryMembershipId.description: Organization member id selected as the primary notary for this case.

estimatedProcessHours.description: Estimated hours to process pending cases

count.description: Number of anomaly cases intercepted by risk control
Total number of cases preserved this month

downloadUrl.description: URL to download the report file

month.description: Month the report covers in YYYY-MM format

caseCount.description: Number of cases included in the report
